items.confirmation_strategy: invalid field suggestion response

items.confirmation_strategy: GraphiQL invalid query stack/debug response

items.confirmation_strategy: schema-shaped server-side import command review

items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes command diagnostic argument

items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes content creation fields rendered downstream

items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes audit log and user-named operations

items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes content creation fields rendered downstream

items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes caller-supplied token identity argument

items.label: GraphQL Interface Protection Bypass

items.label: GraphQL Query Deny List Bypass
items.confirmation_strategy: sensitive field present; deny-list protections require operation-name bypass review

items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes password-based administrative diagnostic query

items.label: Arbitrary File Write / Path Traversal
items.confirmation_strategy: schema exposes caller-controlled filename and content mutation
